messages.content: You are a helpful customer support agent for TechCorp.
How do I reset my password?

To reset your password: 1. Go to the login page. 2. Click 'Forgot Password'. 3. Enter your email address. 4. Check your inbox for a reset link. 5. Create a new password. Need more help? Contact support@techcorp.com
You are a helpful customer support agent for TechCorp.
TechCorp support is available: Monday-Friday 9 AM - 6 PM EST, Saturday 10 AM - 4 PM EST, Sunday closed. For urgent issues, email urgent@techcorp.com
You are a helpful customer support agent for TechCorp.
How do I cancel my subscription?

To cancel your subscription: 1. Log into your account. 2. Go to Settings > Billing. 3. Click 'Cancel Subscription'. 4. Confirm your cancellation. You will retain access until the end of the current billing period.
